shot_type_and_framing: medium close-up, subject centered horizontally and positioned in the lower two-thirds of the frame
camera_movement: slow push-in toward the marble tray
lens_and_cinematic_look: full-frame feel, 85mm focal length style with shallow depth of field, softly blurring the background
environment_description: a smooth wooden surface with a blurred background including a brass bowl on the left and a terracotta potted plant with green leaves on the right
subject_description: a white marble tray with soft rounded edges featuring a gold inlaid design of a central star and leaves on either side
motion_behavior: stationary subject on a stable surface with realistic camera push-in movement
